summary: Replace the `example-value` placeholder in the Example line of the JSON-body endpoint mirrors (lists/notes/outlines add|edit|delete) with a valid-JSON placeholder ('[]').
reason: These commands declare a JSON-array string body flag (--lists/--notes/--outlines) and validate it with json.Valid. The generated Example advertised `--lists example-value`, which fails that guard immediately, so the command's own --help advertised a broken invocation and the live-dogfood happy-path/json-fidelity probes (which run the Example verbatim) rejected all nine commands. The permanent fix lives in the generator (first_command_example.go: jsonStringBodyExamplePlaceholder); this patch carries the same valid-JSON example into the already-printed tree and becomes redundant after the next reprint.
validated_outcome: Full live dogfood gate green (174 pass / 0 fail); `lists add --lists '[]' --dry-run --json` emits a valid dry-run envelope.
